title: Foundation & Integrations
background_rationale: Reliability depends on trustworthy data flow
acceptance_criteria: Children complete; known user yields normalized payloads; missing config blocks startup
test_notes: Validated by child tickets and fixtures

title: Query & Experience
background_rationale: This is the visible AI layer
acceptance_criteria: End-to-end answer works; partial failures visible; web path demoable

title: Quality Ops & Demo
background_rationale: Reviewer trust depends on reliability and clarity
acceptance_criteria: Fixtures pass; fallback mode works; setup docs are reviewer-friendly
rollback_or_fallback: Run recorded demo path if live APIs degrade

title: Bootstrap env schema and auth guardrails
summary: Create TS runtime and fail-fast config
background_rationale: Prevents lost time on bad tokens and missing scope
acceptance_criteria: Dev server starts; health OK; missing env fails clearly; sample config documented
test_notes: Env validation unit test and health smoke
rollback_or_fallback: Boot in fixture mode if live auth fails

title: Team identity mapping query parsing and timeframe rules
summary: Normalize user question to structured request
background_rationale: Identity mismatch is the main failure mode
acceptance_criteria: Required prompts parse; these days=14d; this week=local Monday->now; ambiguity returns clarification
test_notes: Parser fixtures for required prompts and ambiguity

title: Jira Cloud adapter
summary: Fetch assigned Jira work and recent updates
background_rationale: Jira is authoritative for assigned work but permission-sensitive
acceptance_criteria: Normalized issues returned; enhanced search only; privacy/no-match handled; changelog cap enforced

title: GitHub commits and recent-repo adapter
summary: Collect recent commits across tracked repos
background_rationale: Bounded repo scope is the pragmatic MVP
scope: Repo iteration|list commits by author+since|normalize|derive repo set
acceptance_criteria: Commits come from configured repos only; normalized records include repo/SHA/date/message; repo set deduped
rollback_or_fallback: Reduce repo count or derive repos from PRs

title: GitHub pull-request adapter
summary: Collect open and recent PRs across tracked repos
background_rationale: PRs are the clearest demo artifact
scope: Repo iteration|list PRs state=all sort=updated|author/timeframe filtering|normalize
acceptance_criteria: Open and recent PRs returned separately; client-side author filtering documented; empty results are valid
test_notes: Open PR|recent closed PR|no PRs|permission miss
rollback_or_fallback: Show open PRs only if needed

title: Activity schema orchestrator retries and redacted logging
summary: Combine provider data into one resilient payload
acceptance_criteria: Parallel fetch works; one retry on 429/5xx; partial success still yields payload; logs redact secrets
rollback_or_fallback: Disable retries and keep single-attempt calls

title: Grounded response contract and renderer
background_rationale: Answer quality matters but must stay bounded
scope: Deterministic renderer|section contract|caveat rules|optional LLM polish from normalized facts only
acceptance_criteria: Renderer works without OpenAI; output includes Overview/Jira/GitHub/Caveats; no unknown evidence mentioned

title: Web chat UI and thin CLI fallback
summary: Expose same flow through web and CLI
background_rationale: Web is for judging; CLI is insurance
acceptance_criteria: Required prompts run in web UI; readable error states; CLI prints same answer body
test_notes: Manual UI walkthrough and one CLI smoke
rollback_or_fallback: Ship web first and keep CLI minimal

title: Fixtures contract tests grounding checks and smoke evals
summary: Validate with stable fixtures and focused evals
background_rationale: A 2-day prototype needs fast trustworthy tests
scope: Sanitized fixtures|parser tests|adapter contracts|grounding checks|e2e smoke
acceptance_criteria: Required prompts plus ambiguity/no-activity/not-found/partial-failure covered; golden outputs stored; grounding failures detected
test_notes: Include at least one recorded fallback run

title: README demo script fallback dataset and tracker export pack
summary: Package the build for review and demo
background_rationale: Reviewer experience matters nearly as much as code
scope: Setup docs|sample env docs|recorded fallback dataset|10-minute talk track|markdown/CSV/JSON backlog exports
out_of_scope: Cloud deploy guide|direct Jira import automation
acceptance_criteria: Reviewer can configure in under 15 min; fallback mode answers canned queries without live APIs; ticket pack ready for manual/API recreation
rollback_or_fallback: Disclose fixture mode if live APIs are unstable

title: TTL cache and provider concurrency tuning
summary: Add short cache and bounded fan-out
background_rationale: Helpful for repeated demo queries not required for MVP
acceptance_criteria: Repeated queries hit cache; repo fan-out bounded; stale cache expires quickly
test_notes: One cache-hit smoke and one concurrency-limited run

title: Interactive member disambiguation and repo-coverage helper
summary: Improve ambiguous-name UX and visible repo scope
background_rationale: Useful polish if demo data has multiple Johns
acceptance_criteria: Ambiguous names return choices; tracked repos visible from config
